title: Where did agriculture come from?
description: Test your knowledge of early agriculture!
topic_path: The Neolithic Revolution and the birth of agriculture

assessment_items.question_content:
**Why was it difficult for early humans to cultivate land prior to the end of the last ice age?** 

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: What proportion of Earth's water was frozen during the last Ice Age?
Why was it difficult for early humans to cultivate land prior to the end of the last ice age? [[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: all the water that was needed for irrigation was frozen
the large population of other humans made settling in one place dangerous
the soil was too cold and hard to break up with stone tools

assessment_items.question_content:
**In the Neolithic era, how did stone tools change?**

 [[☃ radio 1]]
hints: In the Neolithic era, the stone tools used by human beings became [[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: they became smaller, sharper, and more specialized
they became larger and heavier, to correspond to the robustness of Neolithic human musculature
they became focused exclusively on hunting
